title: diptychandra aurantiaca subsp. aurantiaca
intro: Diptychandra aurantiaca subsp. aurantiaca, also known as the Yellow Dipteryx, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The Yellow Dipteryx has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Diptychandra aurantiaca subsp. aurantiaca include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
